title: G100 Transport Stabilization Patch

requirements.text: Implement safeFetch utility function as global transport layer with base endpoint https://api.binance.com, 5000ms timeout using AbortController, 2 retry attempts with 500ms delay between retries, never throws errors (returns null on final failure), logs FETCH_RETRY event on each retry attempt and FETCH_FAIL event on final failure with {url, error} payload
acceptanceCriteria: safeFetch function accepts url, optional fetch options, and retries parameter (default 2)
AbortController terminates request after 5000ms timeout
On non-ok response or network error, retry up to 2 times with 500ms delay
FETCH_RETRY event logged before each retry with attempt number
FETCH_FAIL event logged on final failure with url and error message
Function returns null on final failure, never propagates error upward
Function returns parsed JSON response on success

requirements.text: Replace all existing Binance API fetch calls in binanceApi.ts with safeFetch utility, change base URL from https://data-api.binance.vision to https://api.binance.com for all endpoints

quotes: REPLACE ALL FETCH WITH SAFE TRANSPORT LAYER

acceptanceCriteria: All fetch calls in binanceApi.ts replaced with safeFetch
Base URL changed to https://api.binance.com
Existing endpoint paths preserved (/api/v3/klines, etc.)
Functions return null when safeFetch returns null
No unhandled promise rejections in binanceApi.ts

requirements.text: Replace fetchExchangeInfo and fetch24hrTickers functions with single fetchUniverse24h function that calls https://api.binance.com/api/v3/ticker/24hr using safeFetch, validates result is array, logs UNIVERSE_EMPTY event and returns empty array if result is not array or null, never throws errors

quotes: If result not array → log UNIVERSE_EMPTY and return []

acceptanceCriteria: fetchUniverse24h function created calling /api/v3/ticker/24hr
Uses safeFetch for transport
Returns empty array if safeFetch returns null
Returns empty array if result is not Array.isArray
Logs UNIVERSE_EMPTY event when returning empty array
Function never throws errors

requirements.text: Modify universeFilter.ts to use new fetchUniverse24h function, lower quoteVolume filter threshold from 20,000,000 to 5,000,000, convert quoteVolume using Number(), implement fallback logic: if filtered array length is 0 then log UNIVERSE_FALLBACK event and take first 20 USDT-ending symbols from raw universe without volume filter

quotes: If filtered.length === 0: Log UNIVERSE_FALLBACK, Take first 20 USDT pairs without volume filter

acceptanceCriteria: quoteVolume filter changed to > 5,000,000
quoteVolume parsed using Number() function
If filtered.length === 0 after all filters applied, log UNIVERSE_FALLBACK
Fallback selects first 20 symbols ending with 'USDT' from raw universe
Fallback bypasses volume filter but keeps USDT requirement
System never produces empty TOP5 due to filtering
Existing UNIVERSE_FILTERED log event preserved with {before, after} counts

requirements.text: Add 300ms delay between per-symbol kline fetch calls only (not between other fetch types or entire engine loop), implement using setTimeout or Promise-based delay helper function

quotes: Add 300ms delay BETWEEN per-symbol kline fetches only
Do NOT delay entire engine loop

acceptanceCriteria: 300ms delay added between consecutive kline fetch calls for different symbols
Delay only applies to per-symbol kline fetching in engineLoop.ts
No delay added to universe fetch or other API calls
Engine tick interval remains 15 seconds
Delay implemented using setTimeout or async delay helper

requirements.text: Modify engineLoop.ts to handle all safeFetch null returns gracefully: TOP5 refresh failures log TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL event but continue engine execution, kline fetch failures skip that symbol but continue processing other symbols, no fetch error may stop ENGINE_TICK or crash the engine, ensure zero unhandled promise rejections in engine loop

quotes: No fetch error may crash engine
No fetch error may stop ENGINE_TICK
TOP5 refresh failure must log TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL but continue

acceptanceCriteria: If TOP5 refresh (fetchUniverse24h) returns empty array, log TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL and continue with existing TOP5
If kline fetch returns null for a symbol, skip RSI calculation for that symbol and continue loop
ENGINE_TICK event logged on every tick regardless of fetch failures
Engine never crashes due to fetch errors
All promises properly caught with try/catch or .catch()
Engine remains deterministic and stable

requirements.text: Add new log event types to store.ts LogEntry: FETCH_RETRY, FETCH_FAIL, UNIVERSE_EMPTY, UNIVERSE_FALLBACK, TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL, TOP5_SKIP_EMPTY, ensure all new events follow existing log structure with timestamp and payload

quotes: Add logs: FETCH_RETRY, FETCH_FAIL, UNIVERSE_EMPTY, UNIVERSE_FALLBACK, TOP5_SET, TOP5_SKIP_EMPTY

acceptanceCriteria: FETCH_RETRY event type added to LogEntry union type
FETCH_FAIL event type added to LogEntry union type
UNIVERSE_EMPTY event type added to LogEntry union type
UNIVERSE_FALLBACK event type added to LogEntry union type
TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL event type added to LogEntry union type
TOP5_SKIP_EMPTY event type added to LogEntry union type
All new event types compatible with existing log buffer (max 1000 entries)

requirements.text: Update LogsTab.tsx to display new log event types (FETCH_RETRY, FETCH_FAIL, UNIVERSE_EMPTY, UNIVERSE_FALLBACK, TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL, TOP5_SKIP_EMPTY) with appropriate color coding: red for FETCH_FAIL and TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL, yellow for FETCH_RETRY and UNIVERSE_FALLBACK, default color for UNIVERSE_EMPTY and TOP5_SKIP_EMPTY
acceptanceCriteria: FETCH_FAIL and TOP5_REFRESH_FAIL events display in red
FETCH_RETRY and UNIVERSE_FALLBACK events display in yellow/warning color
UNIVERSE_EMPTY and TOP5_SKIP_EMPTY events display in default text color
All new event types render properly in logs panel
Payload data displayed for all new event types

constraints: Do NOT change RSI calculation logic or RSI(27) period
Do NOT change entry gate logic (55 < RSI15m < 70, RSI5m > 50, RSI1m cross above 45)
Do NOT change position sizing, stop loss (0.6%), or take profit levels (1%, 2%)
Do NOT change cooldown rules (30min after SL only)
Do NOT change engine tick interval (15 seconds)
Do NOT change any strategy rules or trading logic
Do NOT modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui/*
All fetch calls must use the new safeFetch utility
The engine must never crash or stop due to transport errors
nonGoals: Changing the RSI calculation method or period
Adding new entry/exit conditions beyond transport fixes
Modifying position sizing or risk management parameters
Adding WebSocket or real-time data streams
Implementing order execution on live exchange
Changing the UI layout or adding new tabs
